subcodes.first_line: Verily, We make mention of him who hath been named Moses, and We bid him to that which We have enjoined upon Our servants who have turned towards this Station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من سمی بموسی و نامره بما امرنا به العباد الذین اقبلوا الی هذا المقام
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
